warnings.warningText: High hypoglycemia risk in patients with advanced CKD who are treated with glucose-lowering agents that raise blood insulin levels
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with advanced chronic kidney disease
warnings.actionRequired: Daily glycemic monitoring required to avoid hypoglycemic episodes

warnings.warningText: Risk of hypoglycemia is high in patients with advanced CKD due to reduced renal clearance of insulin
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with advanced chronic kidney disease
warnings.actionRequired: Consider dose reduction and careful monitoring when used in patients with reduced kidney function

warnings.warningText: Hypoglycemia risk assessment before SGLT2i initiation: if patient is on insulin, consider dose reduction
warnings.actionRequired: Consider insulin dose reduction when initiating SGLT2 inhibitors

warnings.warningText: The risk of hypoglycemia is increased when GLP-1 RA are used in combination with insulin
warnings.actionRequired: Consider insulin dose reduction when starting GLP-1 receptor agonists to reduce hypoglycemia risk

warnings.warningText: Higher HbA1c target (e.g., <7.5% or <8%) may be selected for patients at higher risk for hypoglycemia treated with insulin
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with low GFR and those at high hypoglycemia risk
warnings.actionRequired: Consider higher HbA1c targets for patients at high hypoglycemia risk
